featured art

welcome to meowpricot.art!

introduction

hello and welcome to my little corner of the internet, meowpricot.art ! you can call me em if you’d like ~ my hobbies include digital art, crafts, and gaming! this site is a place for me to express myself more freely, and just to have fun with a hobby i don’t get to use often!

anyway, thank you for stopping by, and i hope you have fun exploring a lil’ part of me!

updates

30.03.26 ~ start of a new layout!! + more cliques
a new layout again. because it's really fun ok!! i really adore just making new things ok!! i also joined some more cliques, namely "rainbow" and "lustre" from cliqued, and pixel friends! when this layout is live, i'd like to join more webrings, too
09.03.26 ~ new blog layout!
blog now has a new layout and its SUPER cute!! it's based on old fc2 blogs!! go check it out! also, a new blog post to go along with it!
27.02.26 ~ happy pokemon day blog post!
i write the blog post. its a small thing about pokemon day!
20.02.26 ~ sitemap! and some minor changes
there a sitemap now. also fixed some accessibility issues! also added no ai webring + i choose you pokemon clique (membership pending at time of this update post)!
19.02.26 ~ TWO UPDATES ONE DAY?!?!?!
we have a blog section now. AND. a blog post to go with it! the blog post is specifically targeted towards the Close Knit Online Friend Group, but you can read it too if you'd like!
19.02.26 ~ transferring hosts, grid no more
we're now on git.gay instead of nekoweb! i have no hard feelings for nekoweb, i'm just broke and can't afford a subscription for a custom domain... also, no longer using grid for my page! flexbox is my beloved and no one will stop me from using her.
18.02.26 ~ webrings/cliques and some other stuff
added a keychain to the end of the navigation div, added a spot for webrings and cliques. also some other small & minor graphics!
17.02.26 ~ start of this layout
hello! i always feel a little guilty always stopping and starting new layouts, but if i'm honest... i just find coding to be really fun. my hope is with making something more simple that i'll actually be more motivated to continue working on it!
if that makes sense!
